channel.title: Example Tech Blog
channel.description: A blog about technology and programming

item.title: Introduction to F# 10
item.description: F# 10 introduces several new features including scoped warning suppression and improved performance.
item.author: author@example.com (John Doe)

item.title: Domain Modeling with Algebraic Data Types
item.description: Learn how to use discriminated unions and record types to model your domain.
item.author: author@example.com (Jane Smith)

item.title: Building REST APIs with Giraffe
item.description: A comprehensive guide to building functional web APIs using Giraffe and ASP.NET Core.
item.author: author@example.com (John Doe)
